ticket.description: We are using bluedart and we wish to update shipping status of bluedart on Shopify.

system.client: WordPress/6.8.3; https://www.pluginhive.com

comments.body:
Hello Yash,

Thank you for reaching out with your query.

Our app can be used to show tracking status for your Shopify Orders fulfilled using BlueDart. The tracking status will be available in the app UI where all your orders will be visible with the tracking details and their status.

You can install the app and give it a try. The app comes with 7 days of Free Trail which can be extended case-to-case basis.

We can also connect over a Zoom call to assist you with the integration and answer your queries. You can **CLICK HERE** to schedule the call as per your availability.

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Yash,
 
Thank you for reaching out with your query.
 
Our app can be used to show tracking status for your Shopify Orders fulfilled using BlueDart. The tracking status will be available in the app UI where all your orders will be visible with the tracking details and their status.
 
You can install the app and give it a try. The app comes with 7 days of Free Trail which can be extended case-to-case basis.
 
We can also connect over a Zoom call to assist you with the integration and answer your queries. You can CLICK HERE to schedule the call as per your availability.
 
Looking forward to your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

We look forward to helping you streamline your shipping process.

comments.body:
Hi Team,

The onboarding is at 1 PM IST today.

(Abhilash)

**Background:** They are currently using Eshipz to ship with BlueDart for free, but they want live tracking, which is not available on their free plan. Because of this, they are considering moving to our app. They ship around 3,000 orders per month during the initial months and expect their business to grow. They asked if we could offer some discount.

Hello My,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on jhp1rz-f8.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

Summary - Potential ($49 plan) customer.  Onboarded Successfully.
Majority of their orders are for mainly for 2 specific SKUs and they prefer to update the packaging dimensions at the time of label creation in bulk for multiple orders. With Quick Ship with SKU, Order Status (Processing) and "Item" count filter, their requirements can be easily handled.

URL: jhp1rz-f8.myshopify.com

• 100 orders per page

• Order Export report

comments.body:
Hi Yash,

Good day!

As discussed on our call yesterday, the tracking status in Shopify will be updated to **"Failed Delivery"** for RTO orders.

Please note that the tracking status refreshes every **2–3 hours**, and this update will only apply to orders that have been **fulfilled through the app**.

If you are referring to **older orders that were fulfilled outside the app**, the app will not be able to update their tracking status.

Please let us know if you need any further clarification.
 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/aGrWY3ZdUpZMkppjVtVsRw19o/?name=Screenshot+2026-03-10+at+3.12.39+PM.png)

Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Yash,
 
Good day!
 
As discussed on our call yesterday, the tracking status in Shopify will be updated to "Failed Delivery" for RTO orders.
 
Please note that the tracking status refreshes every 2–3 hours, and this update will only apply to orders that have been fulfilled through the app.
 
If you are referring to older orders that were fulfilled outside the app, the app will not be able to update their tracking status.
 
Please let us know if you need any further clarification.

 
Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive

comments.body:
My team,

The first day of the product has been very, very poor. Neither the token issue is getting resolved, nor is there any clarity about any of the parcels which are not serviceable. The platform doesn't even give you clarity about the pin code serviceability issue; it simply writes "in progress" against it.

I would be planning to uninstall the software. Please, Abhilash, proceed ahead with the uninstallation phase. I don't want to use the platform anymore.

comments.body:
L3:
**ISSUES:**

- **Pickup Token Number:** Customer was informed by BlueDart team that our app is not creating Pickup Token Number when requesting pickup in bulk manually. (Veena is checking with BlueDart team)
- **Delay in Label Creation Flow:** When they used "Generate label" option to create labels for 6 orders, it took about 6 minutes.


**Complaints:**

- **Order Report** currently shows orders that are **not serviceable by BlueDart** with status as **Error/Failed**. The customer suggests using more user-friendly statuses such as **"Initial"** or **"Pending"**.
- Payment Filter to filter COD/Pre-Paid
- SKU equal to / not equal to (or) list of SKUs similar to eShipz.
comments.html_body:
L3:
ISSUES:
  • Pickup Token Number: Customer was informed by BlueDart team that our app is not creating Pickup Token Number when requesting pickup in bulk manually. (Veena is checking with BlueDart team)
  • Delay in Label Creation Flow: When they used "Generate label" option to create labels for 6 orders, it took about 6 minutes.


Complaints:
  • Order Report currently shows orders that are not serviceable by BlueDart with status as Error/Failed. The customer suggests using more user-friendly statuses such as "Initial" or "Pending".
  • Payment Filter to filter COD/Pre-Paid
  • SKU equal to / not equal to (or) list of SKUs similar to eShipz.
comments.plain_body:
L3:
ISSUES:
  Pickup Token Number: Customer was informed by BlueDart team that our app is not creating Pickup Token Number when requesting pickup in bulk manually. (Veena is checking with BlueDart team)  Delay in Label Creation Flow: When they used "Generate label" option to create labels for 6 orders, it took about 6 minutes.  

Complaints:
  Order Report currently shows orders that are not serviceable by BlueDart with status as Error/Failed. The customer suggests using more user-friendly statuses such as "Initial" or "Pending".  Payment Filter to filter COD/Pre-Paid  SKU equal to / not equal to (or) list of SKUs similar to eShipz.

comments.body:
Team, We will be forced to move out of this issue. The day you fix the below three issues, I will move back to PluginHive.
1. The token management: sending one token across multiple AWB numbers.
2. Adding a filter for payment status.
3. Managing the partially paid order. Currently, if someone has partially paid, let's say ₹50, then the COD amount should be subtracted equivalently, which is not happening. The consumers are being charged the full COD amount, so I guess the partial COD case hasn't been handled well.
The day these three issues are resolved and I test, I move back to PluginHive.

Request #380362 "Give Multi Carrier Shipping Labe..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #380362:

Hello My,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** from jhp1rz-f8.myshopify.com

 If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.


> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team
